zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg於大約1321年出生在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉時，他的父親Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III31歲，母親Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw26歲。他和Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1398年12月31日在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉盧巴n享年78歲，埋葬在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg于大约1321年出生在波兰萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉时，他的父亲Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III31岁，母亲Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw26岁。他和Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1398年12月31日在波兰萊瓦福斯吉盧巴n享年78岁，埋葬在波兰萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: occupational name from Middle Low German pravest ‘provost’. See also Provost .
German: nickname for an ostentatious person, from Middle High German brast ‘pageantry, show, display’.
Austrian German: dialect form of   Propst  .

variants.name: Provost
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Andre, Emile, Camille, Lucien, Normand, Alphonse, Cecile, Gilles, Jacques.
French: northern and western variant of Prévost (see Prevost ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (compare 2 below).

English: occupational name from Middle English provost, provest, proust ‘provost, steward, representative’ (Old English prafost), also used for the head of a religious chapter or educational establishment, or, since such officials were usually clergy and celibate, a nickname for a self-important person.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg was born about 1321, in Legnica, Wrocław, Poland, his father, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan. He died on 31 December 1398, in Lubań, Wrocław, Poland, at the age of 78, and was buried in Legnica, Wrocław, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg est né environ 1321, à Legnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne, son père, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1398, à Lubań, wrocławskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Legnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg um 1321 in Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw 26. Er hatte mit Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1398 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Lubań, wrocławskie, Polen und wurde in Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg è nato il circa 1321 nel Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan. Morì il 31 dicembre 1398, nel Lubań, wrocławskie, Polonia, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzegが約1321年にポーランドウロクlアウスキレグニクイで生まれた時，父Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast IIIは31歳，母Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclawは26歳であった。彼はDuchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zaganとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1398年12月31日にポーランドウロクlアウスキルバnで78歳で死去し，ポーランドウロクlアウスキレグニクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg(이)가 대략 1321년 폴란드 록l아w스키 레그닉키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 12월 31일 폴란드 록l아w스키 루바n에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 록l아w스키 레그닉키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg nasceu aproximadamente 1321, em Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia, seu pai, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1398, em Lubań, wrocławskie, Polônia, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia.

ro.The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands: Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg родился около 1321 г. в местности легникки, рокlавски, Польша, его отцу по имени Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan. Он умер 31 декабря 1398 г. в местности лубаn, рокlавски, Польша в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности легникки, рокlавски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg nació aproximadamente 1321, en Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, su papá, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1398, en Lubań, wrocławskie, Polonia, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia.
